summary: Static migration plan for ROS1 catkin package 'ros1_migration_demo' toward ROS2.
package_xml_migration: Migrate package.xml toward ROS2 package format 3 if the project still uses ROS1 package metadata.
Replace catkin buildtool dependency with ament_cmake build metadata after choosing the final ROS2 package style.
Review build, exec, run, and test dependencies and move ROS2 runtime dependencies to exec_depend where appropriate.
Check ROS2 equivalents for every ROS1 dependency before editing package.xml.
build_system_migration: Migrate catkin CMakeLists.txt to ROS2 ament_cmake for C++ nodes.
Use ament_cmake as the primary ROS2 build system and review Python script installation rules.
Replace find_package(catkin REQUIRED COMPONENTS ...) with explicit ROS2-style find_package(...) calls.
Review install rules for Python scripts, C++ executables, launch files, and interface files.
source_code_migration: rospy nodes should be migrated toward rclpy.
rospy.init_node, rospy.Publisher, rospy.Subscriber, rospy.Rate, and rospy.spin patterns require manual migration.
roscpp nodes should be migrated toward rclcpp.
ros::init, ros::NodeHandle, ros::Publisher, ros::Subscriber, and ros::spin patterns require manual migration.
Review parameters, time APIs, logging APIs, QoS settings, callback behavior, and spin behavior.
launch_migration: Migrate ROS1 XML launch files toward ROS2 Python launch files.
Review node declarations, remaps, params, namespaces, arguments, and environment assumptions manually.
Create launch/*.launch.py equivalents for detected ROS1 launch files.
interface_migration: msg files are likely reusable with ROS2 interface review.
srv files are likely reusable with ROS2 interface review.
action files require ROS2 action interface review.
Migrate message generation rules from catkin to the ROS2 build system.

ros2_equivalent_hints: std_msgs -> check ROS2 package availability and API differences
dependency_analyzer_migration_hints: migration_hint: ROS1 dependency 'catkin' should be reviewed for ROS2 direction: ament_cmake or ament_python after choosing the target ROS2 package style
migration_hint: ROS1 dependency 'message_generation' should be reviewed for ROS2 direction: rosidl_default_generators for ROS2 interface generation
migration_hint: ROS1 dependency 'message_runtime' should be reviewed for ROS2 direction: rosidl_default_runtime for ROS2 interface runtime dependencies
migration_hint: ROS1 dependency 'roscpp' should be reviewed for ROS2 direction: rclcpp, with manual review of NodeHandle, publishers, subscribers, parameters, and executors
migration_hint: ROS1 dependency 'rospy' should be reviewed for ROS2 direction: rclpy, with manual review of node lifecycle, parameters, logging, and spin behavior
migration_hint: ROS1 dependency 'std_msgs' should be reviewed for ROS2 direction: std_msgs, usually with message import/build metadata review
migration_hint: ROS1 launch references should be reviewed for the ROS2 Python launch system
migration_hint: ROS1 interface dependencies message_generation/message_runtime usually migrate toward rosidl_default_generators/rosidl_default_runtime
dependency_analyzer_rosdep_hints: rosdep_hint: Python import 'rospy' may require rospy
rosdep_hint: Python import 'std_msgs' may require std_msgs
rosdep_hint: C++ include 'ros/ros.h' may require roscpp
rosdep_hint: C++ include 'std_msgs/String.h' may require std_msgs
rosdep_hint: ROS1 interface files usually need message_generation and message_runtime review

suggested_file_changes: migrate scripts/*.py to ROS2 rclpy node structure
migrate src/*.cpp to rclcpp node structure
keep msg/srv/action files for ROS2 interface review
manual_review_items: custom CMake macros or non-standard catkin logic
parameters, namespace behavior, remapping behavior, timing behavior, and QoS behavior
hardware drivers, serial devices, sensors, and platform-specific assumptions
dynamic launch logic and launch-time substitutions
risks: ROS1 inspection reported package structure issues that may affect migration planning
ROS1 action migration can require manual ROS2 action API review
suggested_next_steps: Review this migration plan before editing files.
Run robopilot migrate-plan-validate --plan <migration_plan.yaml> to check the saved plan.
Run robopilot migrate-scaffold-preview --plan <migration_plan.yaml> to preview the ROS2 scaffold.
Run robopilot deps on the source package and review dependency hints.
Create a separate branch or copy before manually migrating files.
Use robopilot migrate-scaffold only after reviewing the plan and scaffold preview.
safety_note: This migration plan is generated from static inspection only. RoboPilot did not modify source files, generate migrated files, validate runtime behavior, require ROS, run catkin_make, run colcon, execute launch files, execute code, or import user project modules.
